creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
I've thus far been unable to reproduce this myself.
All of the TCP SYN packets (with timestamp option) packets I send through pf are handled correctly.

I'm also a little confused by the WAN capture. If I understand the setup and capture correctly the SYN packets are in fact making it out of the freebsd box (and look correct). If that's true the problem might be outside of this box, rather than with pf.
